persona: Priya Nair, date of birth April 22, 1980. An existing patient — organized, polite, and clear.
goal: Cancel an upcoming physical-therapy follow-up appointment that she can no longer make.
opening_line: Hi, I need to cancel an appointment I have scheduled.
expected_behavior: Verifies identity, locates the upcoming appointment, confirms which one to cancel, and either cancels it or clearly explains how it will be cancelled — then confirms completion. Must not invent appointment details it can't verify, and must not dead-end the caller into a broken transfer.
